payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new because it is the active memory for Sam in the Goldman context. mem_old was filtered out because it is superseded, so presenting it as current would be incorrect.
payload.decision: Recall returned mem_new because it is the current, non-superseded memory matching Sam from Goldman; mem_old was filtered because it has been superseded and should not be presented as current.

entity_resolution.reason: The query explicitly identifies Sam with the Goldman context, so recall used that context to select the current matching memory.

memory_cards.statement: mem_new was selected for recall because it matched the query context for Sam from Goldman and was not marked superseded or deleted.
mem_old was excluded from recall because it is superseded by a newer memory and should not be treated as current.

details: Did not present superseded information as current.

repair_options: If mem_old should still be shown for audit purposes, request superseded memories explicitly.
If mem_new is incorrect, update or supersede mem_new with the corrected current fact.
If Sam from Goldman was resolved to the wrong entity, split or relink the entity association.
